meaning: extra pay given to an employee based on how well they perform
chineseMeaning: 绩效奖金；绩效奖励；基于表现的额外薪酬
anchorSentence: Our team receives a performance-based bonus at the end of each quarter if we meet the delivery targets.
notes: performance-based bonus vs base salary: base salary is fixed; bonus is variable. vs commission: commission is sales-based percentage; performance-based bonus applies to any role. vs incentive pay: nearly interchangeable; incentive pay stresses motivation direction. Hyphen rule: performance-based before a noun needs hyphen; as predicate it can be written without: The bonus is performance based.
recallQuestions: 那个偷偷藏 bug 再修掉来多拿奖金的工程师，他的奖金制度叫什么？
performance-based bonus 和 commission 有什么区别？
用 performance-based bonus 写一句描述你公司或理想薪酬结构的英文句子。
